positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a crescent moon and a constellation map overlaid onto an abstract silhouette of sleeping figures. The design uses a limited, nocturnal color palette of deep indigo, burnt gold, and ethereal silver. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, with clean linework creating strong negative space. The style should be reminiscent of modern linocut or engraving, emphasizing contrast and elegant silhouettes suitable for textile printing. Flat design elements combined with detailed line work. Vector art quality, highly graphic, celestial, dreamlike, perfect for t-shirt print.
